wordplay_note: A tiller of tough hide — resilient
card_description: Ignatz Ledebur (meaning "Ledebur = leather farmer") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Clans of the Alphane Moon*. Schizophrenic holy man of the Heebs clan who has genuine visions. Name note: A tiller of tough hide — resilient. The schizophrenic as prophet — PKD's persistent theme. First appears in *Clans of the Alphane Moon*.

reference.brief: Schizophrenic holy man of the Heebs clan who has genuine visions
reference.significance: The schizophrenic as prophet — PKD's persistent theme
